title: Trustpilot Reviews Scraper: Public Reviews & Ratings
description: Scrape public Trustpilot reviews and company rating summaries from company domains or full Trustpilot review URLs.

companyNames.title: Company Domains or Names
companyNames.description: Company domains or names to scrape, for example "nike.com" or "spotify.com". The Actor builds the Trustpilot URL automatically.

companyUrls.title: Trustpilot Company URLs
companyUrls.description: Full Trustpilot company review URLs, for example "https://www.trustpilot.com/review/nike.com".

maxReviewsPerCompany.title: Max Reviews Per Company
maxReviewsPerCompany.description: Maximum number of reviews to save per company. Start with 1 for a cheap sample. Set to 0 only when you intentionally want all available pages.

sortBy.title: Sort Reviews By
sortBy.description: How to order reviews on each company page. Lowest rated applies a one-star filter unless another rating filter is selected.

filterByRating.title: Filter By Star Rating
filterByRating.description: Only save reviews with this star rating. Choose "All Ratings" for no explicit rating filter.

verifiedOnly.title: Verified Reviews Only
verifiedOnly.description: If enabled, only reviews marked verified by Trustpilot are saved to the dataset.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings for browser requests. Trustpilot uses anti-bot protection, so residential proxies are recommended for reliable results.
